/usr/bin/c++ -O2 CMakeFiles/audio_pub.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_pub.dir/src/recorder.cpp.o -o audio_pub  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rana/anaconda3/lib:/usr/local/lib /home/rana/anaconda3/lib/libopus.so /usr/lib/libzenohc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libportaudio.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libasound.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
